research.title: Top Five Compliance Audit Software and Tools: Mastering Modern Regulatory Risk
research.summary: Executive Summary Manual audit preparation no longer scales across hybrid, cloud, endpoint, and application environments. Compliance monitoring software must move from checklist validation to continuous control monitoring. The strongest platforms connect.

research.title: Dnsmasq DNS Remote Heap Buffer Overflow
research.summary: By David Barksdale In this blog post, we discuss a heap buffer overflow vulnerability that we found in Dnsmasq. This vulnerability was fixed in version 2.92rel2 and 2.93 on 11 May 2026 and assigned CVE-2026-2291 . We cover the technical analysis of the.

vulns.title: reverse shell remote code execution exploit
vulns.summary: Langflow contains a code injection vulnerability that could allow building public flows without requiring authentication.
vulns.technicalSummary: Langflow contains a code injection vulnerability that could allow building public flows without requiring authentication.
vulns.breakdown: Langflow contains a code injection vulnerability that could allow building public flows without requiring authentication.
vulns.whatBroke: Langflow contains a code injection vulnerability that could allow building public flows without requiring authentication.
vulns.reality: Realistic when the affected product is exposed and unpatched. The updater only includes this because public tooling signal was found at CerberusMrXi/Langflow-cve-2026-33017-exploit.
vulns.exploitSyntax:
# authorized lab / owned targets only
git clone https://github.com/CerberusMrXi/Langflow-cve-2026-33017-exploit
cd Langflow-cve-2026-33017-exploit
python3 <script>.py --target https://<authorized-target>
# confirm exact flags in the linked GitHub README before validation
chains: initial access through exposed Langflow
credential access from service context
webshell or command execution follow-up
internal pivot from an internet-facing control point
lateral movement if secrets or management access are recovered
vulns.weaponized: Likely worth tracking because public tooling exists and recent source activity was observed.

vulns.title: Joomlack Page Builder Improper Access Control Vulnerability
vulns.summary: The Joomla extension Page Builder CK is vulnerable to an unauthenticated arbitrary file upload that allows uploading executable files and leads to full RCE.
